name: Barbarian: Frenzy + Extra Attack + Sustained Rage
description: A level 5 Berserker Barbarian fights three Gnolls across 4 rounds. Tests Frenzy (Berserker subclass L3 bonus action melee attack while raging) combined with Extra Attack = up to 3 melee attacks per turn. R1: Enter Rage (bonus action) + Attack x2 via Extra Attack (main action). R2-R4: Attack x2 via Extra Attack + Frenzy bonus attack = 3 attacks per turn. Rage persists because Bjornvar attacks every round. Monsters use defaultBehavior endTurn so no incoming damage — asserting Bjornvar stays at full HP demonstrates rage resistance bookkeeping without noise.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: Attack twice when you take the Attack action.

features.name: Rage
features.description: Enter a Rage as a bonus action. Gain +2 melee damage and resistance to B/P/S damage.

features.name: Reckless Attack
features.description: Gain advantage on melee STR attacks, but attacks against you have advantage.

features.name: Frenzy
features.description: While raging, make one extra melee weapon attack as a bonus action (Berserker subclass L3).

actions.comment: === ROUND 1: Enter Rage (bonus action) + Attack Gnoll Warrior via Extra Attack ===
Roll high initiative to go first
R1: Enter Rage — bonus action. Spends 1 rage charge (3→2). Grants +2 melee damage (ActiveEffect) and B/P/S resistance. Bonus action is now spent — no Frenzy this round.
Verify rage pool decremented: 3 → 2
R1: Attack Gnoll Warrior with Greataxe (main action). Extra Attack will auto-chain after this hit/damage sequence. Rage active: server adds +2 damage from ActiveEffect.
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit
Damage: 8 (die) + 4 (STR mod) + 2 (rage ActiveEffect) = 14 slashing. Gnoll Warrior: 100 → 86. Scenario runner auto-completes the Extra Attack chain with a natural-1 miss.
Verify 14 damage landed. Gnoll Berserker at (20,10) is 10ft from Bjornvar — outside Greataxe cleave reach (5ft) — so no cleave secondary hit.
R1: Bonus action (Rage) already spent — Frenzy not available this round. Monsters use defaultBehavior endTurn, so they do nothing.
Wait for all 3 gnoll turns (they each endTurn automatically — no attacks).
Bjornvar took no damage (gnolls ended turn). Full HP confirms rage resource bookkeeping didn't corrupt state.
=== ROUND 2: Attack (Extra Attack) + Frenzy = 3 melee attack actions ===
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit
Damage: 8 + 4 + 2 = 14. Gnoll Warrior: 86 → 72. Auto-complete handles Extra Attack.
Verify main-action attacks landed.
R2: Frenzy bonus attack. Requires: Rage active (checked via ActiveEffects), bonus action available, Attack action used this turn. Text includes monster name for target resolution.
Frenzy attack roll: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 12 → hit
Frenzy damage: 6 + 4 + 2 = 12. Gnoll Warrior: 72 → 60. bonusAction flag on pending action prevents Extra Attack chain — actionComplete immediately.
Verify frenzy damage applied. Gnoll Warrior at 60 HP after both main + frenzy attacks.
Bjornvar still at full HP (gnolls do nothing).
=== ROUND 3: Reckless Attack + Attack (advantage) + Frenzy (also advantage on STR melee) ===
R3: Attack with advantage from Reckless Attack (STR melee advantage ActiveEffect). Rage still active.
Attack roll (advantage): 16 + 7 = 23 vs AC 12 → hit
Damage: 10 + 4 + 2 = 16. Gnoll Warrior: 60 → 44. Auto-complete handles Extra Attack.
Verify main-action attacks.
R3: Frenzy bonus attack. Reckless Attack advantage also applies to Frenzy (it's a STR-based melee attack).
Frenzy attack roll: 13 + 7 = 20 vs AC 12 → hit
Frenzy damage: 8 + 4 + 2 = 14. Gnoll Warrior: 44 → 30. No EA chain (bonusAction guard).
Gnoll Warrior critically weakened after 3 rounds of triple-attack pressure.
Still full HP — rage resistance intact.
=== ROUND 4: Attack + Frenzy. Verify rage pool still 2 (only spent once at combat start). ===
Attack roll: 14 + 7 = 21 vs AC 12 → hit
Damage: 8 + 4 + 2 = 14. Gnoll Warrior: 30 → 16. Auto-complete handles Extra Attack.
R4: Frenzy — 3rd wave of melee attacks. Rage maintained by attacking each round.
Frenzy attack roll: 15 + 7 = 22 vs AC 12 → hit
Frenzy damage: 6 + 4 + 2 = 12. Gnoll Warrior: 16 → 4.
Final assertions: Gnoll Warrior nearly dead (4 HP), Bjornvar at full HP, rage pool still at 2 (entered rage once and sustained it by attacking). Combat still active with 3 monsters alive.
